channel.title: docker on Articles, Translations, and Blog
channel.description: Recent content in docker on Articles, Translations, and Blog

item.title: Complexity solving catch-22
item.description: Today I’ve stumbled upon an amusing post “Software disenchantment” by Nikita Tonski which resonated with me quite a bit. The following fragment in particular:

item.title: Review: Getting started with Docker and containers
item.description: This is the LISA2017 conference talk review I wrote for their official blog. Just saving a copy here in case they decide to rework their blog and content disappears or something. Submitted by ipesin on November 1, 2017 - 3:38 pm What makes a good conference so special? With vast amounts of information available virtually on any topic imaginable at a click’s distance, would it not be more efficient to spend time in comfortable home setting learning new technology?
